description: See Reflection Probe Wizard for more up to date info

fields.Root: The root slot in which all probes in it's hierarchy should be baked.
fields.ProcessDisabled: Whether to bake probes in disabled hierarchies.
fields.TeleportUserToProbe: Whether to teleport the user to the probe before baking.
fields._tag: Probes only with this tag will be baked.
fields._delayBetweenProbes: How long to wait between baking probes.

methods.OnShowDebugVisuals: Called when the show debug visuals button is touched.
methods.OnHideDebugVisuals: Called when the hide debug visuals button is touched.
methods.OnBakeAll: Called when the bake all button is touched.
